title: Kiss. Hate. Love.
overview: Finally, Hanabi Ayase, Yui Aoi, Marin Ogura and the others are 6th graders! One day, the girls are talking about kissing.

title: Confession
overview: At Yui's household the bath broke and she has to take bath at Hiyama Bathhouse. Even though she decided not to fall in love, she starts having feelings for Kazuma Hiyama.

title: Double Date
overview: Yuuto asked Hanabi to go out with him. His girlfriend convinces him to take Yui and Kazuma along with them. The two couples go on a double date at the mall.

title: Triangle
overview: Class 6-2 has a new student: Hanabi's childhood friend who has just came back from Tokyo, who starts having a crush for Hanabi, despite seeming to be a bit of a bully.

title: Birthday
overview: Hanabi and Ayumu go shopping to get a present for Yuuto's birthday, after which Hanabi will go on a date with Yuuto and give him his present.

title: Boyfriend
overview: Ayumu tries to take Hanabi away from Yuuto. They wind up in a race. Cocoa, who wants to be Yuuto's girlfriend, decides to help Ayumu win. Can Hanabi and Yuuto discover the truth?

title: Beginning
overview: After Kazuma asked Yui to walk her home, she thinks what does she like him for. The answer finds it's begin in previous year...

title: Names
overview: Hanabi and Yui try to address Yuuto and Kazuma by their names, and to make the boys do the same. In the end, only Yui and Kazuma manage to, when Hanabi and Yuuto couldn't.

title: Friends
overview: Due to a misunderstanding, Hanabi and Yui fall out with each other and won't speak to each other for the next few days. In the end, Hanabi reconciles with Yui while defending the latter from other girls from another school.

title: The Weaver Girl and the Cowherd
overview: With the Tanabata coming along, Hanabi's homeroom teacher asked the class to write something nice about their classmates in their Tanzaku in hopes that it will strengthen the bond between boys and girls in the class.

title: Summer Love
overview: After accidentally hitting Yui on the head with a football during the gym lesson, Kazuma invites her to a pool date as an apology and they invite Hanabi and Yuuto.

title: Fireworks
overview: With Yui's cram school lessons and Kazuma's work in his family's bathhouse, Hanabi and Yuuto are left to go on a date at the summer festival.

title: Love Kiss Kiss!?
overview: After entering her puberty, Yui Aoi started having pimples on her face, which worries her that because her pimple, Kazuma might not like.

title: Rival
overview: At cram school, Inaba tries to make Yui like him, but in the end she thinks of him as nothing more than a playboy.

title: Promise
overview: Parent's Day is coming up in class 6-2, and a lot of the family members of the students are coming to the class.

title: Heart
overview: Yui helps the girls in her class make wish bracelets, which are bracelets that, if worn by the person you like and yourself, will make the two of you stay together forever.

title: After the Rain
overview: Inaba takes Yui to the fair to cheer her up. He ties her wish bracelet to a balloon and sets it free to symbolize her leaving Kazuma.

title: Balance
overview: Class 6-2 is performing a school play. The play is Cinderella, and Yui is cast as Cinderella and Yuuto as the prince.
